text:
あっ、そう、これです！
これが、マトイさんがじーっと
見つめていた橙色の花です！

今思い返すと、何かを思い出した
というより、綺麗だなーって
見ている感じでしたが……

ううん、いいえ、きっとこれで
少しは何かを思い出すんじゃ
ないかと思います！　はい！

Yes, that's it! That's the orange flower Matoi
seemed so taken with!

Although, looking back on it, it sort of
seemed less like it was bringing back a
memory and more like she just thought
it looked nice. Hmm...

Well, we cannot be sure without trying!
There's still a chance this could do something
for her confusion.
